source: forced bootstrap from manually validated positive recordings

qualityGate.forcedBootstrapReason: Old asset was trained on partially invalid positive recordings; this asset intentionally resets the rollout to a cleaned positive dataset for further real-world data collection.
qualityGate.deploymentThresholdReason: Using threshold 0.90 instead of the 0.50 compromise threshold to reduce false accepts during bootstrap collection.
qualityGate.reason: no validation threshold satisfied FAR <= 1.00% and FRR <= 20.00%; best compromise FAR=4.38%, FRR=27.27%
